headline: Wall Street weakens as technology stocks drag indexes lower
summary: The heaviest weights on the market were stocks that had soared earlier in the euphoria around artificial-intelligence technology, including drops of 3.2% for Nvidia, 7.5% for Micron Technology and 8% for Applied Materials.  AI stocks have grown so big that they’ve become some of the most influential on Wall Street, and their drops helped drag the S&P 500 lower even though the majority of stocks within the index rose.

raw.headline: Wall Street weakens as technology stocks drag indexes lower
raw.summary: The heaviest weights on the market were stocks that had soared earlier in the euphoria around artificial-intelligence technology, including drops of 3.2% for Nvidia, 7.5% for Micron Technology and 8% for Applied Materials.
